_instructions: 1. Copy this file to 'pipeline.config.json' (next to it, same folder).
2. Copy '.env.template' to '.env' and fill in every required value.
3. Every '$VAR_NAME' below resolves from .env at orchestrator pre-flight (in memory only — secrets are never written back to this file).
4. Remove this _instructions key from your filled pipeline.config.json before running.
5. The orchestrator file is at orchestrator/master-orchestrator.prompt.md. Run it to start the pipeline.

pipeline._mode_note: full = crawl + generate for the whole app; single-route = produce/refresh artifacts for one route only.
pipeline._singleRoute_note: Required only when mode is 'single-route'. Same-domain path, e.g. '/requests/create'.
pipeline._envFile_note: Path (relative to workspace root) to the env file the orchestrator loads in memory at pre-flight.

mcp._configFile_note: Local Playwright MCP config. The orchestrator will detect and start the MCP server from this config if it is not already running.
mcp._autoStart_note: If true, orchestrator launches `npx @playwright/mcp@latest` (per mcp-config/mcp.json) when the server is unreachable.

project._existingProjectPath_note: Required when project.mode='existing'. Absolute path to your test project root. All generated artifacts merge directly into this path — nothing is staged in output/.
project._newProjectPath_note: Used as the default when project.mode='new'. The orchestrator will confirm this path with you (or ask interactively if it's empty/invalid) before creating files.

auth._clientSecret_note: Leave OIDC_CLIENT_SECRET empty in .env for PKCE flows. Required for confidential clients.

crawl._maxRoutes_note: Hard cap on routes Stage 3 will visit per run. New routes discovered beyond this cap are deferred (logged) but not crawled. Increase if your app has > 100 unique pages and you want full coverage in one run.
crawl._maxOptionsPerField_note: Cap on conditional probing per dropdown / radio field. Fields with more options than this are sampled (first, last, uniform subset). The full option list is still captured in field.options.
crawl._includeRoutes_note: If populated, ONLY these routes are crawled. Independent from pipeline.singleRoute.

learning._maxFiles_note: Most-recent N locator-learning JSON files Stage 3 reads from learning/ when biasing locator capture. Older scans are ignored (not deleted). 6 ≈ 6 monthly miner runs.
learning._maxFileBytes_note: Skip any individual learning file larger than this many bytes (5 MB default).
learning._maxAgeDays_note: Skip learning files older than this many days. Default 180 (6 months).
learning._decayBase_note: Time-decay weight base for the multi-file merge. weight(i) = decayBase^i, where i=0 is the newest. 0.7 means file 1 contributes 70%, file 2 contributes 49%, etc.

generation._generateUnreferencedPoms_note: If false, Stage 6 only generates POMs whose pageClass is referenced by at least one test case (recommended).

_outputBehavior_note: All intermediate state lives under output/ during the run.

After Stage 8 completes and the four-artifact contract passes, the orchestrator deletes output/auth, output/crawl, output/logs, output/application-map.json, output/test-plan.json, and output/pipeline-state.json.
Only output/coverage-gap-report.json and output/merge-report.json (existing projects) are kept.
All generated test code lives in your project path — never staged in output/.

learning._maxFiles_note: Maximum number of locator-learning scan files kept in INDEX.json. Older entries are pruned from the index (not deleted from disk) by the miner. Stage 3 merges up to this many files; higher values improve locator signal but increase merge time.
learning._rawLocatorsMax_note: Cap on rawLocators[] entries written per scan file. If the project has more locators, the miner samples uniformly and sets samplingApplied:true.
